title: crataegus monogyna subsp. aguilaris
intro: Crataegus monogyna subsp. aguilaris is a subspecies of the hawthorn tree, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to certain regions. This plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Crataegus monogyna subsp. aguilaris include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may provide health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain cardiovascular diseases. Crataegus monogyna subsp. aguilaris can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often used in traditional medicine to support heart health and overall well-being.
